site.title: Full-Stack Developer
site.subtitle: IT Technologist student | Passionate about software development and technology
site.heroDescription: Building modern web applications with a passion for innovation and continuous learning.
site.bio:
I'm a Programmer and IT Technician, graduate of the IT Technical High School program and currently pursuing an IT Technologist degree.

I specialize in web application development and software solutions, with experience in technologies such as Java, Spring Boot, Node.js, React, TypeScript, Python, PHP, and SQL/NoSQL databases. I enjoy designing and building scalable applications, APIs, and systems that solve real-world problems efficiently.

Throughout my education, I've worked on academic and personal projects that strengthened my skills in Full-Stack development, software architecture, databases, version control, and coding best practices.

I consider myself an analytical, proactive person committed to continuous learning. I enjoy teamwork, taking on new technological challenges, and growing as a developer while delivering quality solutions that create value.
